name: Green Curry Paste (Nam Prik Kaeng Khiew Wah)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cumin and coriander seeds in a pan, without adding any oil.
2. Dry-fry them, stirring, for 1 to 2 minutes until they are aromatic and slightly browned.
3. Pound all ingredients together with a mortar and pestle to produce a fine paste.
